commercial_framing: Proof-backed 48-hour acquisition systems for founders, agencies, and service businesses
one_law: One plan = one shippable recipe row · one Auto Runtime tick = one row · Supabase proof required

plans.title: Fix public install/package claim vs PyPI reality
plans.problem: Homepage/eval references pip install sourcea-boot; package must resolve or copy must say GitHub-only.
plans.goal: Eval page and PyPI probe agree — no false install promise
plans.done_when: probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py ok OR eval copy says GitHub clone pending
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/probe_sourcea_boot_pypi_v1.py --json && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/eval --marker "sourcea-boot" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Open /eval — show install line matches live PyPI or honest GitHub fallback

plans.title: Forge Terminal: fix Connecting… or show honest offline state
plans.problem: Public demo stuck on Connecting damages conversion.
plans.goal: Terminal shows online send path OR clear offline + forge@sourcea.app fallback
plans.done_when: Terminal page markers present; health/send path returns ok or offline banner
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/sourcea/forge/terminal --marker "Forge Terminal" --marker "data-sa-proof-cta" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Send one prompt on terminal — response or explicit offline state

plans.title: Verify intake submit: store lead + confirmation + notification
plans.problem: Lead capture is P0 commercial path; submit not externally verified.
plans.goal: Start/intake POST stores row in Supabase and shows success reference
plans.done_when: mvp-intake-config exposes worker URL; verify_mvp_intake_proof_v1 PASS
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_mvp_intake_proof_v1.py --json && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Submit test lead on /start — show confirmation ID + Supabase row

plans.title: One primary CTA: Request a 48-hour build
plans.problem: Too many CTAs fragment buyer path.
plans.goal: Homepage hero primary CTA = Request a 48-hour build; secondary See proof
plans.done_when: Homepage has data-sa-primary-cta marker linking to /start or /offer
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "Request a 48-hour build" --marker "See proof" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: 10-second test: visitor names paid path without reading nav

plans.title: Canonical pricing ladder across Offer/Start/Pricing
plans.done_when: pricing.html offer.html start.html share same tier copy hash
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/pricing --marker "$1,500" --marker "$5,000" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/offer --marker "48-hour" --marker "$1,500" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count

plans.title: Privacy/data note visible before intake Submit
plans.problem: Form collects email/project; privacy assurance missing.
plans.goal: Intake form shows no-resale privacy note above Submit
plans.done_when: Start page has data-sa-privacy-note marker before submit button
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/start --marker "no resale" --marker "data-sa-privacy-note" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Scroll intake — privacy visible before Submit

plans.title: Simplify product taxonomy box on homepage
plans.problem: Forge/Brain/Chat Unify/Cloud Workers confuse first-time buyers.
plans.goal: One box: SourceA=product · Forge=engine · components named once
plans.done_when: Homepage has data-sa-taxonomy box with three-line explainer
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "data-sa-taxonomy" --marker "Forge is the execution engine" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Read taxonomy box aloud — under 15 seconds

plans.title: Buyer-readable proof: What this proves under live receipt
plans.goal: Live receipt page adds plain-English what-this-proves strip
plans.done_when: GET /sourcea/proof/live JSON + human strip on proof page
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && curl -fsS https://sourcea.app/sourcea/proof/live | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); assert d.get('ok') or d.get('verdict')" && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/proof --marker "What this proves" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Open receipt — non-technical line explains delivery proof

plans.title: Homepage copy upgrade: proof-backed MVPs headline
plans.problem: Hero still dense; research recommends clearer commercial headline.
plans.done_when: Homepage contains Proof-backed MVPs and acquisition systems, shipped fast
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "Proof-backed MVPs" --marker "acquisition systems" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: Read hero — ICP clear in one breath

plans.title: Pricing page route reliability (200 + linked from nav)
plans.problem: Pricing route partially confirmed during external review.
plans.goal: /pricing returns 200 and nav Pricing link resolves
plans.done_when: curl 200 on /pricing and validate-sourcea-contract-pages or link check PASS
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && curl -fsS -o /dev/null -w '%{http_code}' https://sourcea.app/pricing | grep -q 200 && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count

plans.title: Footer relation map: SourceA · Noetfield · TrustField · Gateway
plans.goal: Footer or about shows one-line relation map
plans.done_when: Footer contains data-sa-relation-map with four entities
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "data-sa-relation-map" --marker "Noetfield" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count

plans.title: OpenGraph / LinkedIn share card
plans.goal: og:title and og:description match research §9 P2 copy
plans.done_when: index.html head has og:title Proof-backed AI execution systems
plans.verify: cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/verify_client_proof_artifact_v1.py --url https://sourcea.app/ --marker "og:title" && cd ~/Desktop/SourceA && python3 scripts/cloud_forge_run_supabase_v1.py --query --count
plans.client_demo: LinkedIn post inspector shows correct preview
